name: RFdiffusion
description: Generate new protein structures targeted to your inputs. Choose from one of our tasks or use custom contigs in the RFdiffusion format. Design a de novo binder to a target. Scaffold additional regions of an existing interface. Redesign an existing binder to a target. Diversify an existing protein chain.
capabilities: Generate new protein structures targeted to your inputs
Choose from one of our tasks or use custom contigs in the RFdiffusion format
Design a de novo binder to a target
Scaffold additional regions of an existing interface
Redesign an existing binder to a target

pdbFile.description: Input PDB file containing the target structure or complex

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target protein (for binder design)

binderLength.description: Fixed length or range for the designed binder (binder_design task)

hotspots.description: Target residues to prioritize during binder generation

binderChain.description: Chain ID of the binder to modify (binder_redesign task)

designedResidues.description: Residues to redesign (binder_redesign and partial_diffusion tasks)

designedLengths.description: Length bounds for each redesigned region

interfaceChain.description: Chain with the interface to scaffold (motif_scaffolding task)

interfaceResidues.description: Residues to scaffold in motif scaffolding

partial_T.description: Temperature parameter controlling diffusion extent (partial_diffusion task)

contigs.description: Custom RFdiffusion contig string for advanced usage

verify.description: Whether to verify designs with ProteinMPNN and AlphaFold
